title: Does this Integration (shown in Form View/Automate) even exist?
excerpt: Hi all, in Form View / Edit / Automate there is a GIF preview of an example Form Integration recipe.  Only problem is, this recipe seems to not exist.  If it does exist, can anybody tell me where I can find it?

posts.author: botsquad (Patrick Fallon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all, in Form View / Edit / Automate there is a GIF preview of an example Form Integration recipe. Only problem is, this recipe seems to not exist. If it does exist, can anybody tell me where I can find it?

when-monday-form-is-submitted-notify-x-via-y2498×1802 210 KB

posts.author: ggozalova (Nay Gozalova)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Patrick,

I’ve recorded a quick video for you to have a look: Loom | Free Screen & Video Recording Software | Loom

This should achieve what you are after.

Thanks,
Gunay
